common.searchInstruction: Type the name of the tool you want to find.
common.footerDescription: "Over 138 free online tools to make your daily life easier"

2048.description: The legendary puzzle game to reach the 2048 tile.

length.title: Length Converter | Meters, Feet, Inches
length.description: Convert between meters, feet, inches, centimeters, and miles easily.

weight.title: Weight Converter | Kilograms, Pounds, Ounces
weight.description: Convert between kilograms, pounds, ounces, and grams accurately.

currency.title: Currency Converter | Real-time Exchange Rates
currency.description: Real-time exchange rates for USD, EUR, JPY and more.

temperature-converter.title: Temperature Converter
temperature-converter.description: Instantly convert between Celsius (°C), Fahrenheit (°F), and Kelvin (K). A precise online tool perfect for cooking, science experiments, and checking international weather reports.

area-converter.title: Area Converter
area-converter.description: Easily convert area units including square meters (㎡), acres, hectares, and pyeong. A precise, free online tool for real estate transactions and land measurements.

volume-converter.title: Volume Converter
volume-converter.description: Convert all volume units instantly: liters (L), gallons (gal), cubic meters (㎥), and ounces (oz). A precise, free online tool for cooking recipes and liquid capacity calculations.

speed-converter.title: Speed Converter
speed-converter.description: Instantly convert speed units: km/h, mph, m/s, knots, and Mach. A precise, free online tool for international travel, aviation, maritime analysis, and physics studies.

loan.title: Loan Calculator
loan.description: Accurately calculate your monthly principle and interest payments along with total interest costs by entering the loan amount, rate, and term.

salary.title: Salary Calculator
salary.description: Easily estimate your actual take-home pay by applying the latest 2024-2025 tax rates and social insurance contributions for 4 major insurances.

severance.title: Severance Pay Calculator
severance.description: Calculate your expected severance pay based on your start date, resignation date, and recent 3 months of salary. Compliant with legal calculation methods.

minimum-wage.title: Minimum Wage Calculator
minimum-wage.description: Check and calculate your actual hourly and monthly wage, including weekly holiday pay, based on the 2024 and 2025 minimum wage standards.

compound-interest.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compound-interest.description: Simulate the amazing power of compound interest and your final investment returns by setting the principal, monthly contribution, rate, and period.

percent-calculator.title: Percentage Calculator
percent-calculator.description: Solve everyday percentage problems effortlessly, including finding a percentage of a value, calculating increases/decreases, and discount savings.

discount-calculator.title: Discount Calculator
discount-calculator.description: Input the original price and discount rate to find the final purchase price and amount saved. Supports 1+1 offers and additional discount stacks.

work-hours.title: Work Hours Calculator
work-hours.description: Easily record and check your daily total working hours and weekly accumulated time by entering your clock-in, clock-out, and break times.

age-calc.title: Age Calculator
age-calc.description: Simply enter your date of birth to instantly calculate your current exact age, international age, and the number of days remaining until your next birthday.

date.title: Date Calculator
date.description: Calculate the day count between two dates or find the specific day 100/200 days from now. Manage your D-days and schedules all in one place.

lunch-recommender.title: Lunch Menu Recommender
lunch-recommender.description: Wondering what to eat for lunch today? Get a random menu recommendation from various categories like Korean, Chinese, and Japanese to suit your taste.

word-count.title: Word Counter
word-count.description: Instantly analyze your text to count characters (with/without spaces), words, and sentences. Perfect for checking essay lengths and social media limits.

unicode.title: Unicode Converter
unicode.description: Convert plain text into Unicode format or transform Unicode escape sequences back into readable text for programming and cross-platform compatibility.

string-converter.title: String Converter
string-converter.description: Instantly transform strings between various naming conventions including Upper/Lower case, camelCase, PascalCase, and more for coding efficiency.

base64.title: Base64 Tool
base64.description: An online tool to safely encode text data into Base64 format or decode base64 strings back into their original plain text form for data transmission.

html-encoder.title: HTML Encoder
html-encoder.description: Escape and encode HTML special characters or tags for security, or decode them to their original state to prevent web vulnerabilities and simplify coding.

morse-code.title: Morse Code Converter
morse-code.description: A fun tool to translate Korean, English, and numbers into international standard Morse code or translate Morse signals back into readable text.

base-converter.title: Base Converter
base-converter.description: Perform instant conversions between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal bases. Provides precise results and formatting for each number system.

json-formatter.title: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Format complex JSON data to be human-readable and validate for syntax errors. Visualize your data structure with an easy-to-read tree view.

markdown-editor.title: Markdown Editor
markdown-editor.description: Write Markdown code directly in your browser and see the rendered results in real-time. A simple and efficient tool for documentation and notes.

html-view.title: HTML Formatter
html-view.description: Beautify and format your HTML code or check the real-time rendering of how your code appears in a web browser for web development and learning.

diff.title: Diff Checker
diff.description: Compare two pieces of code or text to visually identify added, deleted, or modified lines. Perfect for tracking changes and debugging.

web-editor.title: Web Editor
web-editor.description: Edit HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code in real-time and instantly see the output. Great for learning web design and frontend development concepts.

hash-gen.title: Hash Generator
hash-gen.description: Generate secure hash values from input text using various cryptographic algorithms like MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 instantly for data verification.

uuid-gen.title: UUID Generator
uuid-gen.description: Generate unique identifiers (UUID v4) for software development. Get multiple unique keys instantly for database entries and API development.

url-encoder.title: URL Encoder/Decoder
url-encoder.description: Safely encode special characters and non-ASCII text in URLs or decode encoded addresses back into readable, original URLs for web navigation.

jwt-decoder.title: JWT Decoder
jwt-decoder.description: Decode JSON Web Token (JWT) headers and payloads to easily check and debug claims and signatures in a secure and convenient environment.

regex-tester.title: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test your regular expressions against target text in real-time and view group capture results to ensure your patterns match accurately.

ascii-art.title: ASCII Art
ascii-art.description: Convert plain text into vibrant ASCII Art characters to create unique visual elements for communities, forums, or code comments.

ascii-table.title: ASCII Table
ascii-table.description: A reference tool providing the ASCII character set, distinguishing between printable and control characters with their corresponding index numbers.

special-char.title: Special Characters
special-char.description: Access a collection of frequently used special symbols, emojis, and arrows that are difficult to type on a keyboard. Copy and paste them anywhere.

cron-generator.title: CRON Generator
cron-generator.description: Generate CRON expressions for Linux or Unix scheduling with just a few clicks. Easily verify and understand the execution schedule of your tasks.

csv-json.title: CSV ↔ JSON Converter
csv-json.description: Convert CSV data from spreadsheets or databases into JSON format, and vice versa, to simplify data processing and integration tasks.

fraction-calculator.title: Fraction Calculator
fraction-calculator.description: Perform arithmetic operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division with fractions. Get precise results in fractional and decimal forms.

encryption-tool.title: Encryption/Decryption
encryption-tool.description: Securely lock and restore important text data using powerful symmetric encryption methods like the AES algorithm with your own password.

qr-gen.title: QR Code Generator
qr-gen.description: Instantly convert any URL or text into a high-quality QR code and download it. A convenient tool for marketing and information sharing.

barcode-gen.title: Barcode Generator
barcode-gen.description: Quickly generate barcoded images in various formats by entering numbers. Perfect for inventory management or retail tasks, for free.

password-gen.title: Password Generator
password-gen.description: Instantly create strong, uncrackable random passwords by combining uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols for your security.

color-picker.title: Color Picker
color-picker.description: Select the perfect color codes for your web design and instantly get HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Useful for creating consistent color palettes.

image-base64.title: Image to Base64
image-base64.description: A developer tool to encode image files into Base64 strings, allowing you to embed images directly into HTML or CSS without external files.

ip-address.title: IP Address Check
ip-address.description: Instantly check your current public IP address and approximate network location. Useful for troubleshooting your internet connection status.

timer.title: Timer/Stopwatch
timer.description: An online timer and stopwatch for precise time measurement during work, exercise, or cooking. Includes lap time tracking functionality.

pomodoro-timer.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro-timer.description: Maximize your productivity and focus by using the Pomodoro technique - 25 minutes of deep work followed by a 5-minute rejuvenating break.

checklist.title: Checklist
checklist.description: Easily record and manage your daily to-do lists or shopping items. Your list is saved locally in your browser even after you close the tab.

flashlight.title: Flashlight
flashlight.description: When you need light in the dark, use your mobile or laptop screen as a flashlight by turning it to maximum white brightness.

image-resize.title: Image Resize
image-resize.description: Adjust the dimensions of your images to specific pixels and compress the file size efficiently while maintaining quality for web or social use.

youtube-thumbnail.title: YouTube Thumbnail
youtube-thumbnail.description: Enter a YouTube video URL to instantly extract and download high-quality thumbnail images to your computer or mobile device.

mandalart.title: Mandalart Planner
mandalart.description: Systematically plan your core goals and 64 detailed sub-tasks using the Mandalart technique, famously used by Ohtani for peak performance.

color-extractor.title: Image Color Extractor
color-extractor.description: Upload any photo or image file to instantly extract a professional color palette and the major HEX codes used in the image.

world-clock.title: World Clock
world-clock.description: Check and compare the current time and time differences across major global cities like New York, London, Paris, and Tokyo in real-time.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator
bmi.description: Enter your height and weight to calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI). Get instant health status guidance and obesity classification.

bmr.title: BMR Calculator
bmr.description: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) based on age, gender, and activity level to determine your daily calorie needs for effective dieting.

biorhythm.title: Biorhythm
biorhythm.description: Visualize your physical, emotional, and intellectual cycles on a graph based on your birth date to check your overall condition for today.

life-expectancy.title: Life Expectancy Test
life-expectancy.description: Take a fun survey about your habits, diet, and exercise to see your estimated life expectancy and get tips for a healthier lifestyle.

reaction-test.title: Reaction Time Test
reaction-test.description: How fast can you react? Precisely measure your reaction speed in milliseconds the moment the screen color changes and record your score.

typing-test.title: Typing Speed Test
typing-test.description: Improve your typing speed (WPM) and accuracy by practicing with various sentences in English and Korean with real-time feedback.

1to50.title: 1 to 50
1to50.description: A brain training game where you touch numbers from 1 to 50 in order as fast as possible. Test your reflexes and concentration skills.

cps-test.title: CPS Test
cps-test.description: Measure how many times you can click your mouse within a time limit to check your Clicks Per Second (CPS) and click speed rank.

aim-trainer.title: Aim Trainer
aim-trainer.description: Improve your mouse accuracy and reaction speed by clicking on random targets. A perfect training tool for FPS gamers and competitive play.

number-memory.title: Number Memory
number-memory.description: Challenge your short-term memory by remembering increasingly longer sequences of numbers. See how far you can go in this memory test.

number-baseball.title: Number Baseball
number-baseball.description: A classic logic game where you deduce a 3-4 digit number using hints of strikes and balls. Test your deductive reasoning and strategy.

minesweeper.title: Minesweeper
minesweeper.description: A logic-based puzzle game where you must clear all cells without detonating hidden mines by using numbered clues to reveal safe areas.

roulette.title: Random Roulette
roulette.description: Fairly decide anything from lunch menus to game penalties by entering your own items into a vibrant, spinning random roulette wheel.

suika-game.title: Suika Game
suika-game.description: An addictive merge puzzle game where you combine smaller fruits to create larger ones, eventually aiming to complete a giant watermelon.

ladder-game.title: Ladder Game
ladder-game.description: A thrilling random draw tool where participants follow winding paths to discover their results. Perfect for betting and quick decisions.

tanghulu-maker.title: Tanghulu Maker
tanghulu-maker.description: Stack fruits to make your own Tanghulu.

missile-dodge.title: Missile Dodge
missile-dodge.description: Survive as long as possible by dodging missiles!

flappy-bird.title: Flappy Bird
flappy-bird.description: Fly as far as you can dodging obstacles!

snake-game.title: Snake Game
snake-game.description: Classic snake game eating apples and growing longer.

sudoku.title: Sudoku
sudoku.description: Classic logic puzzle to fill the 9x9 grid with numbers.

tower-stacker.title: Tower Stacker
tower-stacker.description: Stack the blocks as high as you can!

pitch-test.title: Perfect Pitch Test
pitch-test.description: Listen to the sounds and guess the correct musical note.

capital-quiz.title: World Capitals Quiz
capital-quiz.description: Guess the capital city of each country.

typing-defense.title: Typing Defense
typing-defense.description: Defend by typing the falling words as fast as possible.

hangman.title: Hangman
hangman.description: Guess the hidden word letter by letter.

speed-math.title: Mental Math Game
speed-math.description: Activate your brain with fast mental calculations.

bubble-wrap.title: Bubble Wrap Pop
bubble-wrap.description: Infinite stress relief by popping virtual bubble wrap.

dynamic-acuity.title: Dynamic Visual Acuity
dynamic-acuity.description: Measure your ability to track moving objects clearly.

lotto.title: Lotto Number Generator
lotto.description: Extract your lucky numbers for today with our sophisticated random number generation algorithm. Combine them based on past history for your unique combination.

lotto-sim.title: Lotto Simulator
lotto-sim.description: Check your virtual return on investment and winning odds if you were to buy lottery tickets continuously. Experience the thrill of the draw with this simulation.

tarot.title: Daily Tarot Reading
tarot.description: Have your fortune, love life, and career outlook read with the 22 Major Arcana tarot cards. Mysterious card interpretations guide your way through the day.

blood-type.title: Blood Type Personality
blood-type.description: Check the characteristics, personality, and dating styles of A, B, O, and AB blood types. Discover blood type compatibility with friends and lovers for fun.

mbti.title: MBTI Personality Test
mbti.description: Discover your personality type through our deeply researched questionnaire. Get insights into your 16-personality profile and tips for better relationships.

saju.title: Four Pillars (Saju)
saju.description: Check your innate destiny and Saju (Four Pillars of Destiny) based on your birth date and time. Get detailed interpretations rooted in traditional studies.

zodiac-fortune.title: Zodiac Fortune
zodiac-fortune.description: Check your wealth, love, and health fortunes based on your Chinese Zodiac sign for today. Plan your day with traditional 12-animal zodiac insights.

horoscope.title: Daily Horoscope
horoscope.description: Check your daily horoscope and find out your lucky color and number. Receive messages from the stars every morning to guide your cosmological energy.

dream-interpretation.title: Dream Interpretation
dream-interpretation.description: Wondering what your dream last night meant? Search by keywords to get clear interpretations of hidden symbols and your psychological state.

birth-gen.title: Birthstone/Birth Flower
birth-gen.description: Discover the birthstone and flower that match your birthday, and the meanings and symbolism behind them. Make your special day even more meaningful.

name-analysis.title: Name Analysis
name-analysis.description: Analyze the meaning and energy of your name based on its linguistic and traditional roots. See what kind of fortune your name brings to you.

personal-color.title: Color Psychology Test
personal-color.description: Discover the best colors that match your skin tone and personality. Analyze your personal color palette and its psychological meanings.

past-life.title: Past Life Finder
past-life.description: Who were you in a previous life? Take this fun, imaginative journey through time to discover your past life's identity and personality.

pet-mbti.title: Pet MBTI
pet-mbti.description: Analyze your beloved dog or cat's unique personality using a pet-specialized MBTI framework. Better understand your furry companion's behavior.

mental-age.title: Mental Age Test
mental-age.description: Measure your true mental age based on your attitudes, thoughts, and reactions to daily scenarios. Compare your psychological maturity with your real age.

brain-structure.title: Brain Structure Analysis
brain-structure.description: What's filling your mind right now? Visualize your current interests, worries, and thoughts with our fun brain structure analysis tool.

joseon-job.title: Joseon Dynasty Job Test
joseon-job.description: If you were born in the Joseon Dynasty, what would your profession be? Find your historical career based on your personality and traits.

if-i-am-god.title: If I Were God?
if-i-am-god.description: What kind of world would you create if you were a god? Explore your divine imagination and deep psychological values through this creative test.

life-bgm.title: BGM of My Life
life-bgm.description: What background music best suits your current life situation? Discover your personal soundtrack that matches your vibe and energy right now.

first-impression-color.title: First Impression Color
first-impression-color.description: What color do people first sense when they meet you? Discover the vibrant energy and aura you project to others through this color test.

animal-face.title: Animal Face Test
animal-face.description: Which animal do you resemble the most based on your facial features? Find your animal-like charm, whether it is a puppy, cat, or a fox.

personal-scent.title: Personal Scent Finder
personal-scent.description: Find the signature fragrance that matches your unique vibe and personality. Discover the scent that represents your inner self and character.

ideal-type.title: Ideal Type World Cup
ideal-type.description: Analyze your preferred romantic style through an ideal type tournament. Find out what qualities you truly value in a partner.

couple-compatibility.title: Couple Compatibility
couple-compatibility.description: How well do you and your partner match? Analyze your dating style and harmony level to see how to build a better relationship.

hidden-talent.title: My Hidden Talent
hidden-talent.description: Discover the special ability or potential you haven't realized yet. Check your dormant talents and find new ways to express yourself.

balance-game.title: Balance Game
balance-game.description: A thrilling game where you must choose between two extremely difficult options. Test your values and have fun with friends and family.

fortune-cookie.title: Fortune Cookie
fortune-cookie.description: Cracking open a virtual cookie! Receive a short but powerful message or piece of advice to guide your day and shift your perspective.

color-test.title: Color Sensitivity Test
color-test.description: Test your vision and see if you can distinguish subtle color differences. Measure your visual sensitivity and color perception level.

hearing-test.title: Hearing Age Test
hearing-test.description: Measure your audible frequency range to determine your current hearing age. A simple tool to check your ear health and hearing sensitivity.

smile-dating-test.title: Smile Dating Test
smile-dating-test.description: What kind of 'smile' perfectly represents your unique dating style? Discover your romantic personality and values through this fun test.

dating-test.title: Dating Personality Quiz
dating-test.description: Deeply analyze your romantic tendencies, values, and relationship style. Understand yourself better to build more meaningful connections.

stress-test.title: Stress Level Test
stress-test.description: How stressed is your mind and body right now? Answer a few questions to measure your stress index and get tips for mental relaxation.

brain-type.title: Left/Right Brain Test
brain-type.description: Are you more left-brained or right-brained? Discover which hemisphere of your brain is more dominant and how it affects your thinking style.

eq-test.title: Emotional Quotient (EQ) Test
eq-test.description: Analyze your emotional intelligence (EQ), including empathy, self-awareness, and social skills. Understand your emotional strengths and weaknesses.

smartphone-addiction.title: Smartphone Addiction Test
smartphone-addiction.description: Measure your level of smartphone dependency and digital habits. Get an objective view of your digital usage and tips for a healthier lifestyle.

kkondae-test.title: Kkondae Test (Stubbornness)
kkondae-test.description: Precisely measure your 'Kkondae' index based on your daily attitudes and speech. A fun, anonymous test to check your communication style.

hogu-test.title: Hogu (Pushover) Test
hogu-test.description: Do you find it hard to say no? Check if your kind nature is being taken advantage of through our fun pushover index questions.

debate-test.title: Debate Skills Test
debate-test.description: Test your logic, elocution, and reasoning abilities. Measure your debate skills and see how well you can express your opinions.

idol-test.title: Idol Position Finder
idol-test.description: What position would you have if you debuted in an idol group? Find your perfect role, from lead vocal to main dancer, based on your traits.

resilience-test.title: Resilience Test
resilience-test.description: Measure your inner strength to overcome difficulties and bounce back from stress. Check your psychological resilience and emotional durability.

initial-sound-quiz.title: Initial Sound Quiz
initial-sound-quiz.description: Guess the words corresponding to the given initial consonants within the time limit. A fun quiz game to boost your vocabulary and brain agility.

food-quiz.title: Food/Restaurant Quiz
food-quiz.description: Guess the names of various global dishes based on images or hints. A great chance to test if you are a true foodie or gourmet expert.

association-quiz.title: Association Quiz
association-quiz.description: A high-level deduction quiz where you guess the common answer connecting several given words. Unleash your imagination and logic.

spelling-quiz.title: Spelling Quiz
spelling-quiz.description: Test your knowledge of commonly misspelled words and grammar through our fun quiz. Improve your linguistic precision and score higher.

vocabulary-test.title: Vocabulary Test
vocabulary-test.description: Test your vocabulary level from common words to advanced terminology. Check your rank and see how your word power compares to others.

simple-math.title: Mental Arithmetic Quiz
simple-math.description: Activate your brain with fast-paced mental arithmetic. Solve addition, subtraction, and multiplication problems as quickly as possible.

home.heroTitle: Which tool do you need today?
home.footerDesc: A collection of free online tools to make your daily life easier.

unit.title: Unit Converter Collection
unit.description: Convert all units in one place, including length, weight, currency, temperature, and area. We provide real-time exchange rates and accurate formulas.

finance.title: Finance & Life Calculator Collection
finance.description: Use essential financial calculators for loan interest, salary net pay, severance, and minimum wage. Reflecting legal formulas and latest data.

text.title: Text Conversion & Analysis Tools
text.description: Useful tools for text editing like word counting, case conversion, and Unicode transformation. Simply copy and paste to process text effortlessly.

dev.title: Essential Developer Online Tools
dev.description: Boost productivity with JSON formatters, Base64 encoders, hash generators, and URL encoders, all in your browser without any installation.

utility.title: Convenient Life Utility Tools
utility.description: A collection of various utility tools to solve daily hassles, such as QR code generation, barcode creation, password generators, and world clocks.

health.title: Health & Body Index Calculators
health.description: Professional health index calculators to check your status, including BMI (Obesity), BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate), and Biorhythms.

games.title: Mini Game Collection
games.description: Play addictive mini-games like Suika Game, 2048, Sudoku, and Snake directly in your browser without any installation required.

fun.title: Fortune Telling & Psychology Tests
fun.description: From traditional Saju and MBTI tests to daily horoscopes and Tarot cards! Enjoy a variety of content to explore your fortune and psychology.

trivia.title: Trivia & Common Sense Quizzes
trivia.description: A collection of quizzes to build your knowledge while having fun, including initial sound quizzes and general common sense questions.

category.whyUse: Why use {name} tools on Tool Hive?
category.whyUseDesc: Tool Hive {name} tools run instantly in your web browser without complex installations or annoying ads. Your valuable data is not stored on servers, but processed entirely within your browser for complete privacy and security.
